intro: Corunastylis nigricans, also known as the eastern bronzewing, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Corunastylis nigricans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Australian herbal medicine, Corunastylis nigricans is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and sore throat.
